title: holosteum hirsutum
intro: Holosteum hirsutum, also known as hairy longcalm or hairy holosteon, is a plant species that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Holosteum hirsutum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
